title: Storage Lab: Image Compression & Cloud Storage Benchmarks
subtitle: Reproducible JPEG/WebP/AVIF/JPEG XL, HEIC-tax and cloud $/GB open datasets

resources.description: Per-image JPEG/WebP/AVIF encodes across a quality ladder with SSIM+PSNR vs the lossless master.
Mean size/SSIM/PSNR per format+quality and bytes at matched SSIM (0.95/0.98/0.99).
Same benchmark on high-resolution (12 MP) phone photos.
JPEG/WebP/AVIF/JPEG XL at matched SSIM, plus JXL lossless recompression of a JPEG.
HEIC to JPG/PNG conversion sizes with SSIM vs master (the HEIC tax).
Median size multiplier of converting HEIC to JPG/PNG at matched quality.
Cloud storage $/GB/month and 10-year cost across major providers (2026 US list prices).
MB/hour by streaming service and tier (official + measured).
How many HEIC/JPEG/48MP/ProRAW photos fit per iPhone storage tier.
Passport/visa photo specs (mm, head size, background, digital limits) by country.
Search demand for storage-cleanup queries by country.
Monthly search volume for storage-cleanup queries.
Storage-cleanup search demand pivoted by country and query.
